name: Workflow Orchestrator
description: YAML/JSON-driven workflow orchestration for OpenClaw agents with dependency graphs, parallel execution, retries, output gates, dry runs, cancellation, resume, and persisted run state.

workflowsDir.description: Directory containing workflow definition files. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/workflows.

runsDir.description: Directory where workflow run state files are stored. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/workflow-runs.

baseDir.description: Base directory for resolving relative output file paths. Defaults to the gateway working directory.

concurrency.description: Maximum number of workflow steps that can run in parallel. Defaults to 3.

notifyChannel.description: Channel ID or name for workflow progress notifications. If omitted, notifications are logged only.

sessionModel.description: Default model for spawned step sessions when a step does not specify its own model.

pollIntervalMs.description: How often to poll step session status in milliseconds. Defaults to 5000.

runsDir.label: Run state directory
runsDir.help: Folder where workflow run JSON state files are written.

baseDir.label: Base directory
baseDir.help: Relative output paths in workflow steps are resolved under this directory.

notifyChannel.label: Notification channel
notifyChannel.help: Optional channel for workflow progress messages.

sessionModel.label: Default step model
sessionModel.help: Used by steps that do not declare their own model.

pollIntervalMs.label: Poll interval
pollIntervalMs.help: Milliseconds between status checks for running step sessions.
